features: Compact and portable: The mini freezer block is designed to be small and lightweight, making it easy to carry and store in any cooler or lunch bag.
Superior cooling power: Despite its small size, this freezer block provides excellent cooling performance, keeping your food and beverages chilled for hours.
Versatile usage: Perfect for picnics, camping trips, road trips, or even for everyday use in your lunchbox or mini cooler.
Durable and safe: Made from high-quality, food-grade materials, ensuring the safety and hygiene of your stored items.
Quick and convenient: Freeze the mini freezer block in your freezer until solid, then simply place it alongside your food or drinks to keep them cool.
Cost-effective solution: Say goodbye to constantly buying ice packs. Invest in this reusable mini freezer block for long-term savings and convenience.
Ideal gift: The mini freezer block makes a practical and thoughtful gift for outdoor enthusiasts, travellers, students, or anyone who needs to keep their food and drinks cool while on the move.
Satisfaction guaranteed: We stand by the quality of our mini freezer block and offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with your purchase, we'll provide a full refund or replacement.
